title: agropyron biflorum
intro: Agropyron biflorum, also known as sweet bent or two-flowered wheat grass, is a type of perennial grass that is native to Europe and Asia. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which are attributed to its high concentration of flavonoids and phenolic acids. The health benefits of Agropyron biflorum include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and boost the immune system, making it a popular herbal remedy for various health issues. Agropyron biflorum can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is also used in traditional medicine to treat conditions such as eczema, wounds, and gastrointestinal issues.
